01_livestock_auctioneers.label: Livestock Auctioneers (The Flute Solo)
01_livestock_auctioneers.description: Fast rhythmic 'rattle' filler between numbers. Use for 0:00-0:45 intro.

02_art_auctions.label: High-End Art Auctions (The Clarinet/Bassoon)
02_art_auctions.description: British, precise contrast. Melodic but measured for 122-128 BPM Deep House transition.

03_realestate_storage.label: Real Estate & Storage Auctions (The Brass)
03_realestate_storage.description: Grittier, aggressive. Suited for 138-150 BPM Acid/Hard Techno sections.

04_data_broker_pitch.label: Data Broker Pitch (The Break)
04_data_broker_pitch.description: Corporate Memphis soullessness. For 'Your attention has been valued at $0.003' moment.
